steps.title: Count favorable and total outcomes
steps.content: The favorable outcomes are the black pens: $17$. The total number of pens is $$17+33=50$$

steps.title: Use probability equals favorable over total
steps.content: $$P(\text{black})=\frac{17}{50}$$ To convert to a decimal, divide: $$17\div 50=0.34$$

steps.title: Confirm the grid-in answer
steps.content: The problem asks for a decimal or fraction, not a percent. Enter .34, 0.34, or 17/50.
